# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest stable release of DryGram is supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| >=1.0.0 | :white_check_mark: |
| <1.0.0 | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities in public issues. Instead, report security issues privately by sending an email to `telegramsanthu@gmail.com` or via direct contact chat.
